summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: REQ-1 (WalletCreationResult type with address/privateKey/recoveryPhrase/chain, credentials returned once), REQ-2 (EpiqWallet storage type contains only publicAddress/chain/metadata, no sensitive fields), and REQ-3 (WalletError variants, walletErrors.ts mapping, EpiqWalletsPanel using normalizeWalletError). However, REQ-3 has a partial gap: the backend WalletError variants defined in main.mo do not include #randomnessError or #notAuthenticated as specified in the AC, and walletErrors.ts has no typed case for these variants. The listWallets function is not directly shown in the diff so its return type compliance cannot be fully confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The createWallet backend function returns typed error variants (e.g., #randomnessError, #limitReached, #notAuthenticated, #internalError) rather than trapping or returning an untyped string.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend WalletError type in main.mo defines #unauthorizedAccess, #walletLimitReached, #invalidRequest, and #internalError but does not include the specifically requested #randomnessError or #notAuthenticated variants named in the AC. walletErrors.ts has no typed case for #randomnessError as a WalletError variant, only string-pattern fallback matching.

hallucinated_features.description: WalletOperationError typed class exported from useQueries.ts to wrap backend WalletError variants
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify creating a WalletOperationError class; it only asks for walletErrors.ts to map error variants. This is an extra implementation detail not requested in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: String-pattern fallback matching in normalizeWalletError for timeout, network, fetch, and actor-unavailable error messages
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for mapping of typed WalletError variants returned by createWallet. The additional string-pattern fallbacks for timeout, network, and actor-unavailable errors were not requested.
